content_of_post_to_comment: I hate when dudes say, “It goes both ways.” You go both ways. Get out of my face. And no, not everything goes both ways. Sometimes you’re just wrong. Sometimes I’m just tired. And sometimes I don’t have the energy to turn common sense into a group project.
comment: The tricky part is that “it goes both ways” can be true in theory but become a way to dodge context in practice. Fairness isn’t always equal airtime; sometimes it’s recognizing who is carrying the weight of the moment.
